answer:
<think> I know that KIM-1 is a single-board computer that was designed and built by Westmoreland High School students in 1976. I also know that the students were from Johnstown, Pennsylvania. Therefore, I can infer that the semiconductor design and fabrication company that produced KIM-1 is likely located in Johnstown, Pennsylvania. </think>
<answer> Johnstown </answer>
